mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM posts p INNER JOIN likes l ON p.id = l.item_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.item_type = 'POST' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ( p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (p.visibility = 'FRIEND' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friendships f WHERE ((f.user_id = p.user_id AND f.friend_id = #{userId}) OR (f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.friend_id = p.user_id)) AND f.status = 'ACCEPTED' )) OR (p.visibility = 'CAMPUS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users u1, users u2 WHERE u1.id = p.user_id AND u2.id = #{userId} AND u1.campus_id = u2.campus_id AND u1.campus_id IS NOT NULL )) OR p.user_id = #{userId} )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM posts p INNER JOIN favorites f ON p.id = f.item_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.item_type = 'POST' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ( p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (p.visibility = 'FRIEND' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friendships fs WHERE ((fs.user_id = p.user_id AND fs.friend_id = #{userId}) OR (fs.user_id = #{userId} AND fs.friend_id = p.user_id)) AND fs.status = 'ACCEPTED' )) OR (p.visibility = 'CAMPUS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users u1, users u2 WHERE u1.id = p.user_id AND u2.id = #{userId} AND u1.campus_id = u2.campus_id AND u1.campus_id IS NOT NULL )) OR p.user_id = #{userId} )

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.campus_id, p.visibility, p.poi_name, p.is_top, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at,
-- 用户信息 u.id as user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, u.gender as user_gender, u.campus_id as user_campus_id, u.is_real_name as user_is_real_name, u.created_at as user_created_at,
-- 统计信息 COALESCE(s.view_cnt, 0) as view_cnt, COALESCE(s.like_cnt, 0) as like_cnt, COALESCE(s.fav_cnt, 0) as fav_cnt, COALESCE(s.comment_cnt, 0) as comment_cnt, COALESCE(s.share_cnt, 0) as share_cnt,
-- 当前用户操作状态 CASE WHEN user_like.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_liked, CASE WHEN user_fav.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_favorited
FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_stats s ON p.id = s.post_id
-- 当前用户点赞状态（始终JOIN，但条件性过滤） LEFT JOIN likes user_like ON p.id = user_like.item_id AND user_like.item_type = 'POST'
AND user_like.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
-- 当前用户收藏状态（始终JOIN，但条件性过滤） LEFT JOIN favorites user_fav ON p.id = user_fav.item_id AND user_fav.item_type = 'POST'
AND user_fav.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.campus_id, p.visibility, p.poi_name, p.is_top, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at,
-- 用户信息 u.id as user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, u.gender as user_gender, u.campus_id as user_campus_id, u.is_real_name as user_is_real_name, u.created_at as user_created_at,
-- 统计信息 COALESCE(s.view_cnt, 0) as view_cnt, COALESCE(s.like_cnt, 0) as like_cnt, COALESCE(s.fav_cnt, 0) as fav_cnt, COALESCE(s.comment_cnt, 0) as comment_cnt, COALESCE(s.share_cnt, 0) as share_cnt,
-- 当前用户操作状态 CASE WHEN user_like.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_liked, CASE WHEN user_fav.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_favorited
FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_stats s ON p.id = s.post_id
-- 当前用户点赞状态（始终JOIN，但条件性过滤） LEFT JOIN likes user_like ON p.id = user_like.item_id AND user_like.item_type = 'POST'
AND user_like.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
-- 当前用户收藏状态（始终JOIN，但条件性过滤） LEFT JOIN favorites user_fav ON p.id = user_fav.item_id AND user_fav.item_type = 'POST'
AND user_fav.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
WHERE p.id IN
#{postId}
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
